design_philosophy.core: Light, clean, and minimalist design focused on usability and handling 'overload'. Priority on negative space, sharp data presentation, and clear hierarchy.
rules: No muddy gray transparency. Surfaces must be flat, solid, or use high-end crystal glassmorphism for overlays.
Strict grid hierarchy (The Control Room grid). Dense and compact data spacing, but generous container padding.
Visual tension through contrast: sharp 1px borders against soft, generous padding.
Minimalist means color is function. 95% of UI is monochrome. Color (Blue/Red) exists ONLY to guide user action or indicate status.

typography.strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' adapted for Dashboard SaaS. Radical contrast between headings and body, ensuring data legibility.

heading.usage: Use for all H1, H2, and H3 headers. Apply tracking-tight for all sizes above 32px.

body.usage: Use for body text, data tables, and input fields. Optimal for numerical data (INR ₹) alignment.

surfaces.modal: bg-white border border-neutral-200 rounded-xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] backdrop-blur-xl

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002585] rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-neutral-200 hover:bg-neutral-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 border border-red-200 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-white border border-neutral-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-[#0A0A0A] placeholder-neutral-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/20 focus:border-[#002FA7] transition-all

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-800

shadcn_overrides.card: Override default Vercel-like heavy shadows. Use flat surfaces with 1px neutral borders. No rounding beyond 8px.
shadcn_overrides.tabs: Use border-b style tabs instead of pill styles for a cleaner, technical layout.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive rows (like subscription list items) must subtly change background (to neutral-50) and reveal secondary actions (edit/cancel).
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-out' for micro-interactions (buttons, inputs, row hovers).
interactions_and_motion.loading: Use minimalist skeleton loaders with subtle pulse animation matching the grid structure.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure black or dark gray text on white/off-white backgrounds. Brand blue must have 4.5:1 contrast against white.
accessibility.focus: All focus states must use a 2px ring in primary blue.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='add-subscription-button').

icons.styling: Use strokeWidth={1.5} for a sharp, minimalist technical feel.

brand_logo.description: Minimalist geometric icon for the App Logo/Branding. Use in Nav header and Login screen.

user_avatar.description: Professional minimalist portrait for the user profile avatar in the dashboard.

auth_background.description: Abstract architectural geometric background for the Authentication/Login split-screen layout.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the typography pairing: Cabinet Grotesk (Headings) and IBM Plex Sans (Body). Load them properly via Google Fonts or Fontsource.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Never.
Implement a 'Control Room' dense grid for the analytics dashboard but keep padding generous within individual cards.
Never use generic deep drop shadows on cards. Use 1px borders with maximum 8px border-radius.
All currency must be formatted as INR (₹). Use Recharts for the Expense Analytics and ensure tooltips inherit the minimalist styling (white bg, 1px border).
Apply data-testid to every clickable element and form input for testing.
Do not use placeholder URLs. Use ONLY the exact media URLs provided in this JSON.
Ensure the application handles state transitions smoothly using React Framer Motion or standard CSS transitions as defined in the interactions object.
